# Epics and Stories

> Generated by /gaia-create-epics against docs/planning-artifacts/prd.md and
> docs/planning-artifacts/architecture.md, with risk levels pulled from
> docs/test-artifacts/test-plan.md.

Mode: Greenfield

## Epic 1: Checkout Revamp

**Goal:** Rebuild the checkout flow to support guest and express-pay paths.
**Success criteria:** Guest checkout conversion rate +10%; express-pay
latency p95 < 800 ms; FR-101 / FR-102 satisfied.

### Story E1-S1: Guest checkout form
- Epic: Checkout Revamp
- Priority: P0
- Size: M
- Risk: high
- Depends on: none
- Blocks: E1-S2
- Traces to: FR-101
- Acceptance Criteria:
  - AC1: Guest can submit shipping address and pay without an account.
  - AC2: Form validates required fields before submit.

As a guest shopper, I want to check out without creating an account so that
I can complete my purchase faster.

Dev Notes: Risk: HIGH — run /gaia-atdd before /gaia-dev-story.

### Story E1-S2: Express pay integration
- Epic: Checkout Revamp
- Priority: P0
- Size: L
- Risk: high
- Depends on: E1-S1
- Blocks: none
- Traces to: FR-102
- Acceptance Criteria:
  - AC1: Apple Pay and Google Pay buttons render on checkout.
  - AC2: Express-pay completes in under 800 ms p95.

As a shopper, I want to pay with Apple Pay or Google Pay so that I can
check out in one tap.

Dev Notes: Risk: HIGH — run /gaia-atdd before /gaia-dev-story.

## Epic 2: Observability

**Goal:** Wire checkout metrics, logs, and traces to the central platform.
**Success criteria:** p95 dashboards populated; alerting thresholds wired
to FR-201.

### Story E2-S1: Metrics pipeline
- Epic: Observability
- Priority: P1
- Size: S
- Risk: medium
- Depends on: none
- Blocks: E2-S2
- Traces to: FR-201
- Acceptance Criteria:
  - AC1: Checkout events emit counter + histogram metrics.
  - AC2: Metrics appear in the central dashboard within 60 seconds.

As an on-call engineer, I want checkout metrics in the dashboard so that I
can diagnose regressions quickly.

### Story E2-S2: Alerting rules
- Epic: Observability
- Priority: P2
- Size: S
- Risk: low
- Depends on: E2-S1
- Blocks: none
- Traces to: FR-202
- Acceptance Criteria:
  - AC1: p95 latency > 1s for 5 minutes triggers a page.
  - AC2: Runbook link is attached to every alert.

As an on-call engineer, I want alerting rules wired to the checkout metrics
so that I'm paged when the p95 latency regresses.
